name: add-comparison-table
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Adding a new pairwise statistical comparison table to scylla/analysis/tables/comparison.py. Use when: (1) a new metric column exists in runs_df and needs tier-by-tier Kruskal-Wallis + pairwise Mann-Whitney U + Holm-Bonferroni comparison, (2) implementing a follow-up table after add-analysis-metric adds aggregation columns, (3) the table should produce both Markdown and LaTeX dual-format output matching Table_02 / Table_02b patterns.
